use_cases: Display animated album artwork with spinning vinyl record for music streaming interfaces
Create interactive music player visualizations for audio platforms and artist portfolios
Show currently playing track information with synchronized vinyl animation for media apps
ai_summary: An animated music artwork component featuring a spinning vinyl record visualization with album art, artist, and track information. Includes play/pause controls, smooth entrance animations, and hover effects with mouse tracking. The vinyl rotation speed adjusts based on whether it's a song or album track. Perfect for music streaming platforms, audio players, and media applications requiring visual music playback displays.
